input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.3.1
            TITLE: fuel tanks made of a rigid material must:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.3.1: Fuel Tanks made of a rigid material must:
IC.5.3.1 Fuel Tanks made of a rigid material must: 
a. Be securely attached to the vehicle structure.  The mounting method must not allow 
chassis flex to load the Fuel Tank. 
b. Not be used to carry any structural loads; from Roll Hoops, suspension, engine or 
gearbox mounts

final_answer: Fuel Tanks made of a rigid material must: IC.5.3.1 Fuel Tanks made of a rigid material must: a. Be securely attached to the vehicle structure. The mounting method must not allow chassis flex to load the Fuel Tank. b. Not be used to carry any structural loads; from Roll Hoops, suspension, engine or gearbox mounts
